3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>

- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

A central figure in a black shirt and blue lanyard strikes a drum with white sticks. As the synchronized drumming continues, a large scoreboard structure becomes visible in the background. The drummers maintain their rhythm, with some smiling, while palm trees and a house remain visible on the hillside behind them.

Later in the sequence, the boy's black shirt reveals "SYSTEM BLUE" text while he rapidly strikes the white Pearl snare. Men in grey shirts featuring "BLUE" logos drum in unison beside him. As the performance concludes, the boy stops playing to clutch both sticks in his left hand and hold a white paper in his right. Simultaneously, the surrounding drummers cease their rhythm, lowering their sticks to a resting position.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: A boy in a black shirt with "SYSTEM BLUE" text rapidly plays a white Pearl snare drum in the foreground, his sticks blurring from motion. To his right, men in matching grey shirts and sunglasses drum in unison on similar instruments. A partially visible drummer appears on the left. The group performs on a green field with palm trees and distant figures. Eventually, the drummers stop, resting their sticks while smiling, as the boy lowers his sticks to his waist.

samples.output: <think>The man in the grey shirt and sunglasses on the left raises his right drumstick high. Beside him, the boy in the black shirt looks down while striking his white Pearl snare drum. To the right, men in grey shirts continue playing their matching drums in unison. Palm trees and a fence are visible in the background.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: Describe the sequence of events during the drumming performance, noting specific actions and visible text on equipment or clothing.

answers.text: The performance begins with a blurry view that clarifies to show a drumline on a green field. Men in grey shirts with blue logos and sunglasses play white snare drums labeled "Pearl." A central figure in a black shirt and blue lanyard strikes a drum with white sticks. As the synchronized drumming continues, a large scoreboard structure becomes visible in the background. The drummers maintain their rhythm, with some smiling, while palm trees and a house remain visible on the hillside behind them.

Later in the sequence, the boy's black shirt reveals "SYSTEM BLUE" text while he rapidly strikes the white Pearl snare. Men in grey shirts featuring "BLUE" logos drum in unison beside him. As the performance concludes, the boy stops playing to clutch both sticks in his left hand and hold a white paper in his right. Simultaneously, the surrounding drummers cease their rhythm, lowering their sticks to a resting position.

The group performs on a green field with palm trees and distant figures. Eventually, the drummers stop, resting their sticks while smiling, as the boy lowers his sticks to his waist.
